center.name: 阿纳姆地
center.summary: 阿纳姆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Rufous owl、北澳玫瑰鹦鹉、彩虹八色鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Aru Islands, New Guinea and northern Australia, where it is found in Arnhem Land, the northern Kimberleys, the eastern Cape York Peninsula, and the Mackay Region of eastern Queensland. It is the only exclusively tropical owl in Australia. The global population size of Ninox rufa has yet to be determined, but the species is considered uncommon to rare. The owl inhabits terrestrial ecosystems

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern rosella (Platycercus venustus), formerly known as Brown's rosella or the smutty rosella, is a species of parrot native to northern Australia, ranging from the Gulf of Carpentaria and Arnhem Land to the Kimberley

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is the only species of pitta endemic to Australia. In the Northern Territory it is found in the Top End, from Darwin east to the edge of the Arnhem Escarpment
